creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-07-12 22:19:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/p5-Audio-Scan  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Audio::Scan is a C-based scanner for audio file metadata and tag
  information. It currently supports MP3 via an included version of
  libid3tag, MP4, Ogg Vorbis, FLAC (if libFLAC is installed), ASF,
  WAV, AIFF, Musepack, and Monkey's Audio.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Audio-Scan/
  
  PR:             ports/136660
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1045    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/audio/p5-Audio-Scan/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/p5-Audio-Scan/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/audio/p5-Audio-Scan/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/audio/p5-Audio-Scan/pkg-plist (new)
